code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut sorted = true
  mut has_prev = false
  mut prev = 0
  mut token = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)

  while i <= n
    mut is_ws = true
    mut b = 0
    if i < n
      b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        32
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_ws = true
      else
        is_ws = false
      end
    end

    if is_ws
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        let cur = match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          0
        end
        if has_prev
          if cur < prev
            sorted = false
          end
        end
        prev = cur
        has_prev = true
        token = ""
      end
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  if sorted
    println("YES")
  else
    println("NO")
  end
end
